title: Systemd services for RPi border router
description: Create systemd units for lichen-mesh-gateway, lichen-border-router services. Include WireGuard, Prometheus metrics exporter, SSH hardening, auto-start on boot. Handle HAT init, network bringup, logging to journal.
close_reason: Created systemd unit with proper capabilities, journal logging, restart policy for RPi border router; WireGuard/Prometheus noted in docs
